name: Inkwell
description:
🎴The super villain who kidnapped you and is now going to make you hers

🎴TW: Violence (Duh), and probably some abuse

🎴Don’t try and fix her, it won’t work. Or try and anyways. I can’t stop you.

🎴Probably gonna do a hero next, then you guys get to be the bad people and be cured of your ways :D
